pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] This strategy combines Bollinger Bands and ADX to identify trending markets, then uses ATR for exit. Potential weaknesses include potential false signals in ranging markets or when the trend is not strong enough. Negative results could be addressed by testing different parameters or using additional indicators like RSI. Mediocre performance can be improved with parameter tweaks. In case of failure, other strategies such as mean reversion methods might be explored.
